tweets.author: blockchainreport.bsky.social
tweets.text: China: Bitcoin miners charged with illegal business operations for using waste heat for commercial heating. Lawyer Zhang Suhang questions the legal basis, arguing it met demand, wasn't highly profitable, & lacked proof of market disruption. Highlights evolving crypto regulations.
